nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (NAG-Neg Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

1. Switch_at_Step = end_step splt in the graph

2. Link Basic Scheduler for Native Switch at Step. Note sigmas are approximate values.

3. You can link WanVideo Sigma To Step to end_step of 1st pass and start_step of 2nd pass Wrapper Sampler directly and do not need to caculate the switch_at_step value.

4. Native Sigmas supports denoise <1.0. Wrapper denoise uses different approach.

nodes.title: loop 1 gen method: extend (1) | i2v (2) | mr2v (3) | mi2v (4)
Set to true if you don't have global mem, or you want to use 1st-run or pre-vid mem as global.
Loop 6 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
EXTREME CLOSE-UP – The tip of the brush hovers a few millimeters above the canvas surface. The texture of the canvas is visible. Shallow depth of field. The focus shifts slightly between the brush tip and the canvas.

nodes.title: Loop 7 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
CLOSE-UP – The brush makes contact with the canvas. the character applies a slow, deliberate stroke. The bristles drag through thick blue paint. Macro framing. Camera is static. The soft sound of the brush gliding is implied.

nodes.title: Loop 8 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
EXTREME CLOSE-UP – The thick paint texture as it is applied. Ridges, sheen, and subtle color variations are visible. No camera movement. The focus pulls gently across the stroke.

nodes.title: Loop 9 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
CLOSE-UP of the character's hand, holding the brush, pauses on the canvas for a moment after completing the stroke. His fingers grip the brush firmly, then relax.

nodes.title: Loop 10 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
MEDIUM SHOT, the character steps back from the canvas. His full body is in frame. He looks at the composition. His shoulders are relaxed. The camera dollies back slowly, revealing the studio space and scattered works-in-progress.

nodes.title: Loop 11 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
CLOSE-UP of the character's eyes. The tension around them decreases. A slight smile appears on his face. Minimal camera motion. Warm light catches in his irises.

nodes.title: Loop 12 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
WIDE SHOT, the character stands in the quiet, light-filled studio with his completed abstract painting. Dust particles float in the air. Locked-off camera. The shot holds for a beat.

choose seed generation method:
1. fixed pre-set seed
2. increment based on pre-set seed
3. decrement based on pre-set seed
breake the seed link if you want randomize seed.

nodes.title: How many shots you want to create (extend or cut).
Loop 5 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
MEDIUM CLOSE-UP of the character's face. His brow is furrowed in concentration. A faint paint smudge is on his cheek. Colors from the canvas reflect in his eyes. The camera pushes in slowly.

nodes.title: Loop 4 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
CLOSE-UP of the character's hand mixes a deep blue hue on the palette using a palette knife and a brush. The paints blend together. Gentle handheld micro-movements. Soft studio ambience is audible.

nodes.title: Loop 1 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
MEDIUM SHOT – the character stands in the studio before a nearly finished abstract canvas. He looks at the canvas. His eyes are focused. He holds a paintbrush loosely at his side. Soft daylight. Art materials are scattered around. The camera sways slowly and minimally.

nodes.title: Single run gen method: t2v (1) | i2v (2) | mr2v (3) | mi2v (4) | mm2v (5)
Video Extend Mem: pre-run (1) | global (2) | global + pre-run (3)
Use 1st-gen or 1st-load Mem imgs as Global Mem imgs?
Custom FF (false) | 1st-load video LF (true) as FF for i2v or mi2v

widgets_values:
same shot: extend(1)
new  shot: i2v(2), mr2v(3), mi2v(4)

nodes.title: Tips: It's a good choice to generate shots one by one rather than generating the entire scene's shots at once using the loop.

widgets_values: Link loop last frame to end_image if you want flf2v for i2v(2), mi2v(4) or mm2v(5).
Link loop last frame to end_image if you want flf2v for extend(1), i2v(2) or mi2v(4).

nodes.title: Loop 3 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
CLOSE-UP of the character's wooden palette. Thick oil colors—deep blues, cadmium reds, ochres—are arranged on it. The paint gleams under natural light. Camera is static. Shallow depth of field emphasizes the texture of the pigment.

nodes.title: Loop 2 Positive
widgets_values:
character: An Asian man wearing glasses and a white business T-shirt
scene: a sunlit, spacious studio
CLOSE-UP of the character's hand reaches for a clean, flat brush from a pile of used brushes. His fingers grip the handle. The camera follows the hand movement with slight handheld micro-movements.
